hero_overflow_or_mobile_header_failure.why_it_matters: Above-the-fold breakage ruins first impression and often hides the real value proposition on mobile.
hero_overflow_or_mobile_header_failure.recommended_fix: Refactor the hero/header structure until it fits the viewport and communicates the core value without overflow.

font_loading_or_typography_failure.why_it_matters: A declared visual system is not real if the fonts do not load or the typography remains generic and unintentional.
font_loading_or_typography_failure.recommended_fix: Verify the actual font-loading path and simplify the type system until hierarchy and personality are explicit.

cta_or_onboarding_failure.why_it_matters: A UI or landing cannot be treated as ready if it does not tell people what to do next or the CTA path is broken.
cta_or_onboarding_failure.recommended_fix: Restore a working next-step CTA and explain the first practical action clearly.

touch_accessibility_failure.why_it_matters: Broken touch targets, missing focus-visible or invalid interactive semantics create real usability failures.
touch_accessibility_failure.recommended_fix: Raise tap targets to at least 44px, restore focus-visible and remove invalid nested button patterns.

seo_or_security_baseline_missing.why_it_matters: A surface is not production-ready if it lacks baseline SEO or security evidence.
seo_or_security_baseline_missing.recommended_fix: Add baseline SEO metadata and confirm required security headers before calling the project ready.

visual_evidence_missing.why_it_matters: Atlas should not claim strong visual readiness without an evidence trail.
visual_evidence_missing.recommended_fix: Add evidence expectations and a manual visual review trail before final handoff.

landing_reads_like_readme.why_it_matters: A public landing that feels like documentation will underperform and fails the anti-generic product brief.
landing_reads_like_readme.recommended_fix: Reframe the landing around audience, promise, CTA and onboarding instead of documentation density.

landing_copy_or_onboarding_weak.why_it_matters: Repetitive copy and missing onboarding make the surface feel unfinished even if it is technically functional.
landing_copy_or_onboarding_weak.recommended_fix: Reduce repetition, explain how to begin and make the first action concrete.

integration_claims_ahead_of_readiness.why_it_matters: Atlas must not communicate advisory or watchlist integrations as if they were active and ready.
integration_claims_ahead_of_readiness.recommended_fix: Downgrade the claim to readiness/watchlist language until the external surface is truly configured and tested.

integration_missing_tests_or_labels.why_it_matters: Without tests and explicit labels, integration posture becomes misleading and brittle.
integration_missing_tests_or_labels.recommended_fix: Add clear readiness labeling and a focused test before promoting the integration posture.
